title: All 10 Coimbatore counting centres sealed; CAPF tightens cordon ahead of May 4
summary: All ten constituency counting centres across Coimbatore have been brought under three-tier security with CAPF, TSP and local police personnel deployed round the clock. The District Election Officer confirmed that EVM strong rooms remain under live CCTV, with feeds open to all party agents 24x7 ahead of counting day on May 4.

title: Industry bodies meet candidates, push 12-point post-poll agenda
summary: Coimbatore industry associations including CODISSIA, COINDIA and SIEMA jointly handed over a 12-point charter to candidates from all major alliances, demanding power tariff stability, MSME credit reform and a dedicated industrial corridor between Coimbatore and Tiruppur.

title: EVM strong room CCTV feed opened to party agents 24x7
summary: The Coimbatore Collectorate has activated dedicated viewing rooms outside each strong room where authorised representatives of all contesting parties can monitor live CCTV feeds continuously until counting begins.

title: IMD yellow alert: Heavy rain forecast for Coimbatore and Western Ghats
summary: Isolated heavy rainfall is expected across Coimbatore district today, with the Western Ghats stretch likely to see thunderstorms by evening. Authorities have advised residents in landslide-prone zones near Valparai and Anaikatti to stay alert.

title: PSG Tech researchers unveil low-cost air quality sensor for tier-2 cities
summary: A PSG College of Technology research team has launched a sub-Rs 5,000 air quality monitoring device designed for deployment across Tier-2 industrial cities. Field trials begin next week in Peelamedu and Singanallur.

title: Avinashi Road metro alignment study moves to public consultation
summary: The detailed project report for Coimbatore's first metro corridor along Avinashi Road has entered public consultation. CMRL has invited written objections and suggestions through May 31.

title: Pollachi coconut traders warn of price drop ahead of harvest peak
summary: Traders at the Pollachi coconut market have flagged a 12 percent drop in wholesale prices over the past week, citing oversupply from neighbouring Karnataka and weak Kerala demand.

title: GH Coimbatore opens new 200-bed paediatric block
summary: Coimbatore Government Hospital has commissioned a dedicated 200-bed paediatric care block equipped with a 40-bed PICU and a milk bank, funded under the state health mission.

title: Liquor shops closed near Kerala border ahead of neighbouring state polls
summary: Forty-eight TASMAC outlets along the Coimbatore-Kerala border in Madukkarai, Pollachi and Anaimalai blocks have been closed for 48 hours under Election Commission instructions.

title: Singanallur Lake bird census records 14 new migratory species
summary: The annual Singanallur Lake bird census conducted by the Coimbatore Forest Division has recorded 14 new migratory species this season, taking the total tally to 137 documented birds.

title: Coimbatore Airport adds direct daily flight to Singapore from June
summary: AAI confirmed that a major carrier will operate a daily Coimbatore-Singapore service from June 15, marking the city's second international destination after Sharjah.

title: Kovai Kutralam waterfall closed to tourists during heavy rain alert
summary: Forest officials have temporarily closed Kovai Kutralam falls to visitors after upstream water levels rose sharply following overnight rainfall in the Anaimalai range.

title: CODISSIA Trade Fair complex to host engineering expo from May 15
summary: The CODISSIA Trade Fair Complex will host the 24th INTEC Engineering Expo from May 15, with over 800 exhibitors confirmed across machine tools, electricals, and EV components.

title: Special long-distance bus services from Gandhipuram for return travel
summary: TNSTC has announced 90 special buses operating from Gandhipuram, Mettupalayam Road and Ukkadam terminals tomorrow to handle the post-holiday return rush to Chennai, Bengaluru and Madurai.
